allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Name "node" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd C:\\catchme\\backend; node server.js')
